modular_project_structure: Organize project files into logical directories (e.g., core, models, api) to enhance maintainability and scalability.
use_pydantic_for_data_validation: Utilize Pydantic models for defining request and response data schemas, ensuring automatic data validation and serialization.
centralized_configuration_management: Manage application settings and environment variables through a dedicated configuration module (e.g., core/config.py) for easy access and modification.
modular_api_routing: Structure API endpoints using FastAPI's APIRouter to group related routes and improve code organization.
